translations.- Country codes: Refer to [this document:
- Country codes: Refer to [this document](https://help.apple.com/app-store-connect/#/dev997f9cf7c){:target="_blank"}.

- APP_ID: Go to the App's web page, and you will get a URL like: https://apps.apple.com/tw/app/APP_NAME/id **12345678**. The number after "id" is the App ID (digits only).

- page: You can request pages 1 to 10; data beyond that cannot be retrieved.

- sortBy: `mostRecent/json` fetches the latest reviews in JSON format. You can also use `mostRecent/xml` for XML format.

translations.1. [AppFollow](https://appfollow.io/){:t:
1. [AppFollow](https://appfollow.io/){:target="_blank"}: Using the Public URL API (RSS) is just passable.

2. [feedis.io](https://feedis.io/product/proxime/features){:target="_blank"}: Uses the Private URL API and requires your account credentials.

3. [TradeMe/ReviewMe](https://github.com/TradeMe/ReviewMe){:target="_blank"}: A self-hosted service (node.js). We originally used this but faced the issues mentioned above.

4. [JonSnow](https://github.com/saiday/JonSnow){:target="_blank"}: Self-hosted service (GO), supports one-click deployment to Heroku, author: [@saiday](https://twitter.com/saiday){:target="_blank"}
translations.1.⚠️Private URL API 方法，如果用有二階段驗證的帳號，最長每: 1.⚠️ For the Private URL API method, if the account has two-factor authentication enabled, it requires re-verification every 30 days at most to keep using it, and there is currently no workaround; if you can create an account without two-factor authentication, you can use it smoothly without issues.
translations.2.⚠️不論是免費、付費、本文的自架；切勿使用開發者帳號，務必開一個獨立的 Ap: 2.⚠️ Whether free, paid, or self-hosted as described in this article; never use a developer account. Always create a separate App Store Connect account with only "Customer Support" permissions to prevent security issues.
3. It is recommended to use [rbenv](https://gist.github.com/sandyxu/8aceec7e436a6ab9621f){:target="_blank"} to manage Ruby, as the system's built-in version 2.6 may cause conflicts.

translations.```ruby\n# Extension Spaceship->TunesCli:
```ruby
# Extension Spaceship->TunesClient
module Spaceship
  class TunesClient < Spaceship::Client
    def get_recent_reviews(app_id, platform, index)
      r = request(:get, "ra/apps/#{app_id}/platforms/#{platform}/reviews?index=#{index}&sort=REVIEW_SORT_ORDER_MOST_RECENT")
      parse_response(r, 'data')['reviews']
     end
  end
end
```
translations.```ruby\n# Slack Bot\ndef notify_slack(r:
```ruby
# Slack Bot
def notify_slack(review)
  rating = review["rating"].to_i
  color = rating >= 4 ? "good" : (rating >= 2 ? "warning" : "danger")
  like = review["helpfulViews"].to_i > 0 ? " - #{review["helpfulViews"]} :thumbsup:" : ""
  date = review["edited"] == false ? "Created at: #{Time.at(review["lastModified"].to_i / 1000).to_datetime}" : "Updated at: #{Time.at(review["lastModified"].to_i / 1000).to_datetime}"
  
    
  isResponse = ""
  if review["developerResponse"] != nil && review["developerResponse"]['lastModified'] < review["lastModified"]
    isResponse = " (Reply is outdated)"
  end
  
  edited = review["edited"] == false ? "" : ":memo: User updated review#{isResponse}:"

  stars = "★" * rating + "☆" * (5 - rating)
  attachments = {
    :pretext => edited,
    :color => color,
    :fallback => "#{review["title"]} - #{stars}#{like}",
    :title => "#{review["title"]} - #{stars}#{like}",
    :text => review["review"],
    :author_name => review["nickname"],
    :footer => "iOS - v#{review["appVersionString"]} - #{review["storeFront"]} - #{date} - <https://appstoreconnect.apple.com/apps/APP_ID/appstore/activity/ios/ratingsResponses|Go To App Store>"
  }
  payload = {
   :attachments => [attachments],
   :icon_emoji => ":storm_trooper:",
   :username => "ZhgChgLi iOS Review Bot"
  }.to_json
  cmd = "curl -X POST --data-urlencode 'payload=#{payload}' SLACK_WEB_HOOK_URL"
  system(cmd, :err => File::NULL)
  puts "#{review["id"]} send Notify Success!"
 end
```

translations.```ruby\nindex = 0\nbreakWhile = true\nw:
```ruby
index = 0
breakWhile = true
while breakWhile
  app = Spaceship::Tunes::login(APPStoreConnect account (Email), APPStoreConnect password)
  reviews = app.get_recent_reviews($app_id, $platform, index)
  if reviews.length() <= 0
    breakWhile = false
    break
  end
  reviews.each { |review|
    index += 1
    puts review["value"]
  }
end
```
translations.```ruby\nlastModified = 0\nif File.exist:
```ruby
lastModified = 0
if File.exists?(".lastModified")
  lastModifiedFile = File.open(".lastModified")
  lastModified = lastModifiedFile.read.to_i
end
newLastModified = lastModified
isFirst = true
messages = []

index = 0
breakWhile = true
while breakWhile
  app = Spaceship::Tunes::login(APPStoreConnect account (Email), APPStoreConnect password)
  reviews = app.get_recent_reviews($app_id, $platform, index)
  if reviews.length() <= 0
    breakWhile = false
    break
  end
  reviews.each { |review|
    index += 1
    if isFirst
      isFirst = false
      newLastModified = review["value"]["lastModified"]
    end

    if review["value"]["lastModified"] > lastModified && lastModified != 0  
      # Do not send notification on first use
      messages.append(review["value"])
    else
      breakWhile = false
      break
    end
  }
end

messages.sort! { |a, b|  a["lastModified"] <=> b["lastModified"] }
messages.each { |message|
    notify_slack(message)
}

File.write(".lastModified", newLastModified, mode: "w+")
```
translations.```ruby\nrequire \"Spaceship\"\nrequire:
```ruby
require "Spaceship"
require 'json'
require 'date'

# Config
$slack_web_hook = "Target notification web hook url"
$slack_debug_web_hook = "Notification web hook url for bot errors"
$appstore_account = "APPStoreConnect account (Email)"
$appstore_password = "APPStoreConnect password"
$app_id = "APP_ID"
$platform = "ios"

# Extension Spaceship->TunesClient
module Spaceship
  class TunesClient < Spaceship::Client
    def get_recent_reviews(app_id, platform, index)
      r = request(:get, "ra/apps/#{app_id}/platforms/#{platform}/reviews?index=#{index}&sort=REVIEW_SORT_ORDER_MOST_RECENT")
      parse_response(r, 'data')['reviews']
     end
  end
end

# Slack Bot
def notify_slack(review)
  rating = review["rating"].to_i
  color = rating >= 4 ? "good" : (rating >= 2 ? "warning" : "danger")
  like = review["helpfulViews"].to_i > 0 ? " - #{review["helpfulViews"]} :thumbsup:" : ""
  date = review["edited"] == false ? "Created at: #{Time.at(review["lastModified"].to_i / 1000).to_datetime}" : "Updated at: #{Time.at(review["lastModified"].to_i / 1000).to_datetime}"
  
    
  isResponse = ""
  if review["developerResponse"] != nil && review["developerResponse"]['lastModified'] < review["lastModified"]
    isResponse = " (Developer response is outdated)"
  end
  
  edited = review["edited"] == false ? "" : ":memo: User updated review#{isResponse}:"

  stars = "★" * rating + "☆" * (5 - rating)
  attachments = {
    :pretext => edited,
    :color => color,
    :fallback => "#{review["title"]} - #{stars}#{like}",
    :title => "#{review["title"]} - #{stars}#{like}",
    :text => review["review"],
    :author_name => review["nickname"],
    :footer => "iOS - v#{review["appVersionString"]} - #{review["storeFront"]} - #{date} - <https://appstoreconnect.apple.com/apps/APP_ID/appstore/activity/ios/ratingsResponses|Go To App Store>"
  }
  payload = {
   :attachments => [attachments],
   :icon_emoji => ":storm_trooper:",
   :username => "ZhgChgLi iOS Review Bot"
  }.to_json
  cmd = "curl -X POST --data-urlencode 'payload=#{payload}' #{$slack_web_hook}"
  system(cmd, :err => File::NULL)
  puts "#{review["id"]} send Notify Success!"
 end

begin
    lastModified = 0
    if File.exists?(".lastModified")
      lastModifiedFile = File.open(".lastModified")
      lastModified = lastModifiedFile.read.to_i
    end
    newLastModified = lastModified
    isFirst = true
    messages = []

    index = 0
    breakWhile = true
    while breakWhile
      app = Spaceship::Tunes::login($appstore_account, $appstore_password)
      reviews = app.get_recent_reviews($app_id, $platform, index)
      if reviews.length() <= 0
        breakWhile = false
        break
      end
      reviews.each { |review|
        index += 1
        if isFirst
          isFirst = false
          newLastModified = review["value"]["lastModified"]
        end

        if review["value"]["lastModified"] > lastModified && lastModified != 0  
          # Do not notify on first use
          messages.append(review["value"])
        else
          breakWhile = false
          break
        end
      }
    end
    
    messages.sort! { |a, b|  a["lastModified"] <=> b["lastModified"] }
    messages.each { |message|
        notify_slack(message)
    }
    
    File.write(".lastModified", newLastModified, mode: "w+")
rescue => error
    attachments = {
        :color => "danger",
        :title => "AppStoreReviewBot Error occurs!",
        :text => error,
        :footer => "*Due to Apple technical limitations, precise review scraping requires re-login setup about once a month. Thank you for your understanding."
    }
    payload = {
        :attachments => [attachments],
        :icon_emoji => ":storm_trooper:",
        :username => "ZhgChgLi iOS Review Bot"
    }.to_json
    cmd = "curl -X POST --data-urlencode 'payload=#{payload}' #{$slack_debug_web_hook}"
    system(cmd, :err => File::NULL)
    puts error
end
```
translations.index = 分頁 offset，一次最多顯示 100 筆。\n\n: index = Pagination offset, showing up to 100 items at a time.
translations.page：可請求 1~10 頁，超過無法取得。\n: page: You can request pages 1 to 10; beyond that, data cannot be retrieved.
translations.sortBy： `mostRecent/json` 請求最新的＆ json 格式: sortBy: `mostRecent/json` requests the latest reviews in JSON format. You can also change it to `mostRecent/xml` for XML format.
translations.使用 Ruby+Fastlane-SpaceShip 動手打造 APP 評價追蹤: Build an App Review Tracking and Slack Notification Bot Using Ruby + Fastlane-SpaceShip
translations.使用 while 遍歷所有分頁，當跑到無內容時終止。\n\n: Use a while loop to iterate through all pages and stop when no content is found.
translations.具備深度整合的 APP 工具也是用這個方法（AppRadar/AppReview: APP tools with deep integration also use this method (AppRadar/AppReviewBot…).
translations.即可。 *(*更多 ruby 環境問題可參考文末提示)*\n\n: Done. *(For more Ruby environment issues, see the tips at the end of the article)*
translations.另外經過測試後發現，只需要在帶上 `cookie: myacinfo=<Toke: After testing, it was found that simply including `cookie: myacinfo=<Token>` can spoof the request to obtain data:
translations.另外還加上了 begin…rescue (try…catch) 保護，如果有出現: Additionally, a begin…rescue (try…catch) block was added for protection. If an error occurs, a Slack notification is sent to alert us to check (usually due to session expiration).
translations.單純用一個 `.lastModified` 紀錄上一次執行時拿到的時間。\n\n: Simply use a `.lastModified` to record the time obtained during the last execution.
translations.回傳評價的資訊太少（沒留言時間、已編輯過評價？、已回覆？）\n: The returned review information is too limited (no comment time, edited review?, replied?)
translations.因蘋果實行全面兩步驟登入，所以登入 session 需要定期更新。\n: Because Apple enforces full two-step authentication, the login session needs to be updated regularly.
translations.因蘋果現在實行全 Two-Step Verification，所以對於登入驗證自: Since Apple now enforces full Two-Step Verification, automating login authentication has become more complicated. Fortunately, [Fastlane](https://docs.fastlane.tools/best-practices/continuous-integration/){:target="_blank"}, which has been battling Apple’s security measures, supports official App Store Connect API, iTMSTransporter, and web authentication (including two-step verification). We can directly use Fastlane’s command:
translations.將 `myacinfo = value` 帶入就能取得評價列表。\n\n: Assigning `myacinfo = value` allows you to retrieve the review list.
translations.我們可以建立一個 `reviewBot.rb` 檔案，編譯執行時只需在 Term: We can create a `reviewBot.rb` file, and to run it, simply enter the following command in the Terminal:
translations.所以我們自己在 TunesClient 中擴充一個方法，裡面參數只帶 app_i: So we extend a method in TunesClient ourselves, with parameters only including app_id, platform = `ios` (**all lowercase**), and index = page offset.
translations.所以考慮找其他工具、方法取代。\n\n: So consider finding other tools or methods to replace it.
translations.最多存取 10 頁\n: Access up to 10 pages at most
translations.最近才知道 Slack 中轉發 APP 最新評價訊息的機器人是要付費的，我一直以: I recently found out that the bot forwarding the latest app reviews to Slack requires a paid subscription. I always thought this feature was free. The cost ranges from $5 to $200 per month because these platforms don’t offer just the "App Review Bot" feature. They also provide data analytics, record keeping, unified dashboards, competitor comparisons, and more. The pricing depends on the services each platform offers. The Review Bot is only a part of their package, but I only want this feature and nothing else. Paying for the full service feels like a waste in this case.
translations.會得到類似如下字串：\n\n: You will get a string like this:
translations.有了動機之後，再來研究下達成目標的原理。\n\n: With the motivation set, let's next explore the principles behind achieving the goal.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.本來以為 Fastlane 只能幫我們到這了，再來要自己串起從 Fastlane: I originally thought Fastlane could only help us this far, and that we would have to manually connect the flow from getting the cookie with Fastlane to calling the API. But after some exploration, I found that Fastlane's authentication module `SpaceShip` has even more powerful features!
translations.本來是用免費開源的工具 [TradeMe/ReviewMe](https://g: Originally, we used the free open-source tool [TradeMe/ReviewMe](https://github.com/TradeMe/ReviewMe){:target="_blank"} for Slack notifications, but this tool has been unmaintained for years. Occasionally, it floods Slack with old reviews, which is alarming (many bugs have long been fixed, making us think there was a new problem!). The cause is unknown.
translations.此 RSS API 很老舊都沒更新\n: This RSS API is very outdated and has not been updated.
translations.此指令會完成網頁登入驗證(包含兩步驟認證)，然後將 cookie 存入 FAST: This command completes the web login authentication (including two-step verification) and saves the cookie into the FASTLANE_SESSION file.
translations.現已改用全新的 [App Store Connect API](../f1365: The App Reviews Bot has now been redesigned using the brand-new [App Store Connect API](../f1365e51902c/) and relaunched as “[ZReviewTender — Free and Open-Source App Reviews Monitoring Bot](../e36e48bb9265/)”.
translations.經過以上心路歷程，更瞭解的 Slack Bot 的運作方式；還有 iOS App: After going through the above process, I have a better understanding of how the Slack Bot works and how to scrape iOS App Store reviews. I also got a feel for Ruby—it’s quite nice to write!
translations.蘋果有提供 [App Store Connect API](https://de: Apple provides the [App Store Connect API](https://developer.apple.com/app-store-connect/api/){:target="_blank"}, but it does not offer a feature to fetch reviews.
translations.蘋果有提供公開的 APP 評價 [RSS 訂閱網址](https://rss.i: Apple provides a public APP review [RSS subscription URL](https://rss.itunes.apple.com/zh-tw){:target="_blank"}, offering both rss xml and json formats.
translations.這個 endpoint 取得評價列表：\n\n: This endpoint retrieves the list of reviews:
translations.這個方法說來有點旁門左道，也是我突發奇想發現的；但在後續參考了其他 Review: This method is somewhat unorthodox and was a sudden idea I came up with; however, after looking into other Review Bots, I found many websites use the same approach. It should be fine, and I saw tools doing this 4 to 5 years ago, though I didn't study it in depth back then.
translations.遇到資料錯亂問題（後面幾頁偶爾會突然噴舊資料）\n: Encountering Data Disorder Issues (Occasionally Older Data Appears Suddenly on Later Pages)
